title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: langchain-ai/langchain (Ollama integrations)
summary: LangChain community package providing Ollama LLM and chat integrations for building RAG and agent pipelines.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for interacting with the Ollama server; generate, chat, embed, pull, and manage models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and modern browsers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-user support, model management, and RAG plugins.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Community thread sharing RAG templates and tools that plug into Ollama via llama.cpp and LangChain.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial Rust CLI that wraps Ollama REST endpoints for quick model pulls, listings, and chat from the terminal.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU node-affinity and PVC model caching.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components for building LLM pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Discussion thread on wiring Ollama local models into Neovim via copilot.vim fork or custom plugin.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node that adds Ollama chat and generate actions to no-code workflows.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container for CI pipelines needing local LLM calls.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: Minimal FastAPI backend exposing a ChatGPT-compatible endpoint that proxies to a local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-embeddings
summary: Lightweight PyPI package that wraps Ollama’s embeddings endpoint for use in sentence-transformers-style workflows.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community-driven recipes for using Ollama with LangChain, LlamaIndex, Docker, GPU stacks, and edge devices.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Official Streamlit example app demonstrating streaming chat with Ollama in under 50 lines of Python.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian community plugin that adds a chat pane and commands to summarize notes using a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve example deploying Ollama as a scalable LLM service with autoscaling and batching.

title: ollama-macos-swift
summary: Swift package that wraps the Ollama REST API for macOS/iOS apps built with SwiftUI.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that listens in guild channels and replies using Ollama models; supports slash commands and message queues.
